overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a scenic natural landscape. The character traverses from dense grasslands onto a dirt path beside a stone wall, eventually reaching a lakeshore with snow-capped mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow with scattered trees and mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through tall grass and wild shrubs toward the distant mountain range

entered.detail: tall golden-brown grass covering the ground
dense pine and spruce trees covering the mountain slopes
large mountain peak with snow visible on the summit
individual pine trees dotting the landscape

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a wide-open grassy meadow with tall wild grasses and scattered shrubs. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distance beyond a dense coniferous forest, with bright midday sun illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path with stone wall and wooden fence

events.description: terrain transitions from wild grassland to a defined dirt path with stone wall appearing on the right
wooden fence sections appear along the right side of the path alongside the stone wall

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the dirt path, passing the stone wall on his right side

entered.detail: well-trodden dirt trail winding through the landscape
low stone wall running parallel to the path
rustic wooden fence posts and rails

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a defined dirt path with a stone wall running along the right side. Geralt walks steadily forward as the terrain becomes more structured, with wooden fence sections visible further along the path and open views of the distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested trail with stone wall on left

events.description: path enters denser tree cover creating dappled shadow patterns on the ground
lake becomes visible through the trees on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the forested path as the stone wall moves to his left side

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as it enters a more forested area with denser trees on the right side. The stone wall now runs along the left side of the path. Dappled sunlight filters through the canopy, and glimpses of a lake become visible through the trees toward the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside trail with water on left

events.description: emerges from forest cover onto open lakeshore with clear view of the water
walking along the water's edge with mountain reflections visible in the lake

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the lakeshore path with the water to his left

entered.detail: calm reflective lake surface showing mountain reflections
white and yellow wildflowers growing along the lakeshore

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the forest onto an open lakeshore path. The calm lake water stretches to the left with clear reflections of the snow-capped mountains. Wildflowers dot the grassy bank between the path and the water as the character continues walking along the scenic shoreline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wild meadow that gradually transitions into a structured rural path. It begins with Geralt walking through a wide-open grassy landscape filled with tall wild grasses and scattered shrubs under a bright midday sun. As he moves forward, the open terrain shifts toward a defined dirt path, with the wild greenery giving way to a stone wall running along the right side. The scene then expands to reveal wooden fence sections further along the route, while the distant snow-capped mountains and coniferous forests remain a constant backdrop to the journey.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, wooded path that gradually opens into a vast, sunlit lakeshore. It begins as the path narrows into a forested area where dappled sunlight filters through a dense canopy of trees and a stone wall lines the left side. As the camera moves forward, glimpses of water appear through the foliage, signaling a transition away from the woods. The scene then expands as Geralt emerges from the forest onto an open shoreline, where the enclosed greenery gives way to a wide expanse of calm lake water. Finally, the view opens fully to reveal wildflowers dotting the grassy bank and clear reflections of snow-capped mountains shimmering on the water's surface.
